name: @snowluma/runtime
description: SnowLuma runtime distribution manifest: ships into dist/ (launcher.bat, package.json, native/*.dll, native/*.node). All native bindings ship as standalone `.node` files in `dist/native/` — loaded via `process.dlopen()` / `createRequire().require()` from inside the bundle. There are intentionally NO runtime npm dependencies; production artifacts are self-contained.
